findings.snippet: toast.success(t("governance.batch.done", { defaultValue: "{{n}} request(s) processed", n: results.length }), {

gateChecks.label: No route crashes, is blank, or fails to navigate.
No known alias direct-renders instead of redirecting to its canonical path.
No detail route shows raw undefined/NaN/Invalid Date.
No route claims seed fallback armed in strict-live mode.
No route shows a mock/demo success claim as production truth.
No CORS console errors on the hosted origin.
Session/RBAC: invalid session cannot read privileged management data.
gateChecks.note: Authenticated /bff/me returns operator identity.:pass; Invalid/no-role token is rejected by /bff/me (401/403).:pass; Privileged management read is not served under an invalid session (fails closed).:pass
